name: Juuko Tokusou Dinnovator
original_name: 獣甲特装ディノベイター
overview: Juuko Tokusou Dinnovator, is a Japanese Tokusatsu web-television series created by AV company GIGA in homage to Toei's Metal Heroes series. The show airs exclusively on YouTube for all-ages, with its final episode being exclusively on an adults-only DVD and digital download.

trailers.title: 特報『獣甲特装ディノベイター（DINNOVATOR）』配信決定！！
